author: śrī⋅jayadeva gosvāmī
verses:
he govinda he gopāla
keśava mādhava dīna⋅dayāla

tumi parama dayāla prabhu, parama dayāla
keśava mādhava dīna dayāla

pīta⋅vasana pari mayūrera śikha dhari
muralīra vāṇī⋅tule bole rādhā⋅nāma

tumi moder gopāla prabhu, moder gopāla
keśava mādhava dīna⋅dayāla

bhava⋅bhaya⋅bhañjana śrī madhusūdana
vipada⋅bhañjana tumi nārāyaṇa
en_translation:
O Govinda! O Gopāla! O Keśava! O Mādhava! O You who are compassionate to the fallen!

You are supremely merciful, my Lord, supremely merciful. O Keśava! O Mādhava! O You who are compassionate to the fallen!

Wearing yellow garments and holding a peacock feather, He plays His flute and utters the Name of Rādhā.

You are our Gopāla, my Lord, our Gopāla! O Keśava! O Mādhava! O You who are compassionate to the fallen!

He is the destroyer of the fear of material existence, Lord Madhusūdana. You are the dispeller of all dangers, Lord Nārāyaṇa.
